description:
FEM pov

ੈ✩‧₊˚ ~ your boyfriend that still loves you even if you have depression 

you’ve been dating haru kikuchi for around two months now, he’s the only person you could say that has actually stuck around longer then a school break. you couldn’t see why haru choose you to be his girlfriend, especially when your like **this**. you understood that you could live with that fact that you may not be able to be somewhat *normal* again but maybe getting into a relationship can help you in some ways.

• [ in which you and your boyfriend were hanging out and he noticed your scars.. ]
